description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set on a large rectangular green plot, surrounded by a low perimeter wall. The structure features a simple, rectangular footprint with a central entrance and a covered porch area at the front. The roof appears flat and uniform, with a light color that contrasts with the darker boundary wall and the green lawn. The building is divided into several rooms, as indicated by the visible internal walls and layout. Windows are distributed along the longer facades, providing natural light to the interior spaces. The overall design is modern and functional, with a focus on open, accessible living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, central entrance, and a surrounding low wall on a green plot. The layout is rectangular with multiple rooms and evenly spaced windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and the full width of the bungalow with the surrounding lawn and wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bungalow, the driveway or path leading to the entrance, and the side arrangement of rooms and windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the continuation of the boundary wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side of the bungalow, with visible room divisions and the green plot extending around the building.
